title: Roundtable on Empowering Elected Representatives and Citizens
description: A comprehensive roundtable discussion on how elected representatives and citizens can be empowered through digital governance tools and open-source platforms.

title: The Solver Network | A Policy Vision for Collaborative Public Problem-Solving
description: This paper presents a policy vision for building a collaborative solver network to address public sector challenges at scale.

title: State-led Urban Digital Transformation
description: Exploring how state governments can lead urban digital transformation using open digital infrastructure and data-driven governance.

title: From Goa to the Globe: How Pravimal Abhishek led the GIDC to digitally transform industrial governance
description: A story of digital transformation in Goa's industrial governance sector and how it became a model for other states.

title: Tech for Billions, Talent for None: Fixing GovTech's Biggest Gap
description: An analysis of the talent gap in government technology and how to bridge it to ensure equitable digital service delivery for all citizens.

title: From Systems to Ecosystems: A Shared Journey to Build Digital Public Goods
description: How eGov transitioned from building isolated systems to fostering rich digital ecosystems that deliver public value at scale.

title: Enabling Social Benefit Delivery through Digital Public Infrastructure
description: A case study on how digital public infrastructure enabled seamless delivery of social benefits to over 4000+ beneficiaries across states.

title: Accelerating Revenue Mobilisation through Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI)
description: How DPI helped state governments achieve 250% growth in revenue mobilization through digital tax and billing systems.

title: National Urban Innovation Stack – Strategy & Approach
description: A detailed strategy note on the National Urban Innovation Stack and its approach to transforming urban service delivery in India.

title: Reimagining Sanitation Services with Digital Public Infrastructure
description: A strategy note on how digital public infrastructure can reimagine and improve sanitation service delivery across urban and rural India.

title: Karnataka's Centre for Smart Governance and eGov Foundation Announce Strategic Partnership
description: Karnataka's Centre for Smart Governance partners with eGov Foundation to transform public service delivery across the state.

title: AI for Sustainable Cities: AIRAWAT and eGov Foundation Launch Strategic Partnership
description: AIRAWAT and eGov Foundation launch a strategic partnership to leverage AI for sustainable urban governance.

title: eGov DIGIT Platform: 2023 Annual Impact Report
description: The 2023 Annual Impact Report showcasing the reach and impact of the DIGIT platform across India and globally.

title: Government of Punjab and eGov Foundation Sign MoU to Drive Urban Innovation
description: Punjab and eGov Foundation sign a historic MoU to drive urban innovation across technology, policy and revenue systems.

title: A Digital Approach for Sustainable Rural Water Systems
description: How digital tools and IoT integration are enabling sustainable management of rural water supply systems across India.

title: mGramSeva: A Digital Lifeline for Rural Revenue Collectors
description: How mGramSeva became a beam of comfort for rural revenue collectors, digitizing the collection of water tariffs across 5000+ villages.
